title: Sniffer Egg Never Cracks
description: This resource pack allows you to place a sniffer egg (and turtle egg) in an item frame and it will look like it is placed, but it will never crack.
body:
# UNHATCHABLE SNIFFER EGG 

This resource pack allows you to place a sniffer egg or a turtle egg in an item frame and it will look like it is placed, but it will never crack.

You can download this resourcepack to decorate your builds with unhatchable sniffer egg/turtle egg.

NOTE: The sniffer eggs/turtle eggs HAS to be placed inside item frames. They have NO COLLISION and can be placed on walls for some questionable decoration.
